title: Wwtp Clean Waste Water Pretreatment Automatic Metal Mechanical Ro
summary: The YMGS rotary bar screen is a solid-liquid separation device that continuously and automatically removes all kinds of solid sundries from the fluid. It is used for wastewater pretreatment and industrial applications.
bullets: Low power consumption with minimal noise

specs.label: Rake Tooth Material
specs.value: ABS engineering plastic, nylon, or stainless steel

specs.label: Frame Material
specs.value: Stainless steel or carbon steel with corrosion protection
